entry.title: Avoid rescheduling of Production Order when adding Rework operations
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have simple requirement to capture rework material and labor cost per work center. We are looking into manually adding rework operation anything there is a need to rework some of the units. For example Production order has 4 operations with order quantity of 10 EA . First 2 operation are completed and final confirmed. Now we are on 3rd operation and there is a need to rework 3 units. We are planning to manually add a rework operation with rework control key. We can adding all the components required for this rework to this operation and charge the labor hours to it. 

Everything works when it comes to confirming material and labor hours. Our issue is when we add rework operation, system reschedule all the confirmed operation (my understanding this is standard behavior) and changes order header dates. This is messing up our weekly schedule and On-time matrix. 

I have tried changing 'Shift Order' setting Production order Scheduling parameter. Removing scheduling check from rework control key but no luck.

We understand we can use trigger point to either add rework operation or create rework order however our rework is very simple and we don't want to go all the work to setup the master data to support this. 

My question is, is there a way to influence standard system behavior to not reschedule order when we add rework operation.

Thank you!!

entry.title: SAP Community Escape House for July – SAP Cloud Application Event Hub ⚽️ 🏆 🏟️
entry.content:
The seventh SAP Developer Challenge of the year is now available! The Developer Advocates have created the SAP Community Escape House - a virtual escape house (consisting of multiple rooms) that you can play in your browser. Read on for all the details.

SAP Developer Challenges are all about having fun, trying new things, and learning along the way. You can also earn a badge in the SAP Community upon successful completion. For this year, all SAP Developer Challenges will happen in the SAP Community Escape House. For each challenge, we will unlock a new room in the house, and they all have a specific focus topic. Completing a challenge means successfully escaping the room by solving a series of coding-related tasks/questions. This month is all about events between SAP cloud applications, specifically the BTP service - SAP Cloud Application Event Hub.

How to participate

Visit the SAP Community Escape House and enter your numeric SAP Community user ID. If you don't know your user ID, go to your SAP Community profile. You can find the numeric ID at the end of the URL.

SAP Community Escape House - Enter your SAP Community ID


Once you see the SAP Community Escape House, select the SAP Cloud Application Event Hub room and start exploring it.

The user interface of an escape room includes the room itself as well as a terminal. You can click the objects in the room to receive tips. Like in a real (physical) escape room, you will have to try out a few things and explore the room until you receive helpful tips and, eventually, instructions. These tips and instructions are printed on the terminal next to the room. The terminal is also used to submit solutions to tasks. Read the instructions you receive carefully to understand how.

 

If you successfully escape the room (you will know when that happens), you will receive a badge in the SAP Community. We will assign the badges once the challenge closes.

The schedule

The SAP Cloud Application Event Hub room was unlocked on July 1st and will stay unlocked until the end of the year. However, the challenge closes on July 31st, so you must escape the room until then to qualify for a badge. Unlike the previous year, this SAP Developer Challenge does not consist of weekly sub-challenges. The next room (next challenge) will be unlocked in August.

Good luck and happy escaping!

entry.title: Re: Adding Revlv field in ME2M Report
entry.content: Thank you for your response.

entry.title: Re: Overwrite Role in Enable Now (IPS)
entry.content:
No, it won't. The IAS sends the roles's names, but no information about permissions these roles have.

So, if the role with the same name exists, nothing will happen, if the role doesn't exist, SAP Enable Now will create it with no permissions assigned.

entry.title: What is the best way to handle NZ Localisation to Allow for Investment Boost?
entry.content:
In New Zealand the Government has implemented a new depreciation scheme as of the 22nd of May 2025.  This key change allows NZ businesses to have an additional upfront depreciation deduction of 20% followed by ordinary depreciation of the remaining 80% from the date of acquistion.

I can't seem to locate any information to see if there is a localisation request for this for New Zealand.  We have also looked at the Exprt Configuration spreadsheet but I would define this as a "Local legal requirement" in which case the information dialog box says to raise a ticket.

Is there a way in Public Cloud to handle this out of the box or how do we go about getting a localisation change made for NZ?

Please see a reference link to the change below.

New assets - Investment Boost

entry.title: Re: ABAP: Fast JSON Serialization
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"It might be strange but always remember: Building up strings using concats and traversing over field-symbols inside a structure is very slow in ABAP compared to native languages --> Where possible Kernel Modules like Simple Transformations are preferable performance wise."

 

Love these knowledge nuggets! Thank you!

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: How to load Data From ECC to S4 Hana Finance for Grou...
entry.content: You can extract the TB from ECC into a flatfile and upload it in GR using flexible upload of reported data.

entry.title: Re: Product master creation in S4HANA
entry.content: Check this where similar discussion has taken place and SAP employee has responded.  Of course, the said SAP note has been removed.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Web IDEの画面に表示されているJava Build Pack1廃止の警告の件について
entry.content:
以下のいくつかの情報にあるとおり、SAP Java Buildpack1の削除の期限を、2025年6月末から、10月1日に延期しました。
こちらのNote等にも記載されているとおり、移行作業を行わぬまま10月1日を迎えSAP Java Buildpack 1が削除された後に再デプロイやrestageを実行するとCloud Foundryのアプリケーションが動かなくなります。
Web IDEのツールの問題ではなく、BTPのCloud Foundry RuntimeでSAP Java Buildpack 1が削除されるという話ですね


これ以上の延期は多分難しいと思いますので、10/1までSAP Java Buildpack 2へ移行することをお勧めします。


https://me.sap.com/notes/0003625132
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/new-migrate-your-applications-from-sap-java-buildpack-v-1-to-v-2

entry.title: How to Configure QS41 & QS51: Steps for Opening Customizing Views in Different Systems
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’d like to share a quick guide based on a recent configuration we performed to open QS41 and QS51 for customizing in different systems (Development, Quality, and Production). This can help those facing restrictions while accessing QS41/QS51 catalog maintenance across landscapes.

🔧For Development & Quality Systems

SAP Note: 356483

To open the configuration of QS41/QS51, follow these steps:

  1. Execute transaction SE54.

  2. Enter the following customizing objects one by one:

    • V_QPGR_KAT

    • V_QPCD_KAT

    • V_QPAC_KAT

    • V_QPAM_KAT

i. Choose "Generated Objects".

ii. Click on "Create/Change".

iii. On the Generation Environment screen, scroll to the "Dialog Data Transport Details" block at the bottom.

iv. Select "No, or user, recording routine".

v. Save your changes and capture in TR.

⚠️Important: Do not transport these changes to the production system. These settings are system-specific and must be applied only where necessary (i.e., Dev or QA).

🏭For Production System

SAP Note: 736920

  1. Execute transaction SOBJ.

  2. Choose the 'Enter Conditions' indicator.

  3. Click 'Maintain'.

i. Specify and update the following objects one by one:

V_QPAM_CL

V_QPGR_CL

ii. Set the indicator 'Current Settings'.

iii. Save the changes and capture in TR.

Follow the same procedure in the Development system, create the Transport Request (TR), and then move the TR to Quality and Production.

✅Summary:

This setup ensures QS41/QS51 catalog maintenance is accessible and editable where required without compromising system integrity. 

Let me know if you’ve used alternate approaches or encountered specific scenarios during implementation. Your inputs are most welcome!

Best regards,
Binod Kumar

entry.title: Re: Sunset of BEx Tools - Frequently Asked Questions and Answers (FAQ)
entry.content:
Hi Vincent,

In order to identify the list of users still using BEx Analyzer, go totransaction SE16, and table RSDDSTAT_OLAP:

  • For BEx Analyzer / Workbook usage:
    • Use selection “BEX” as STEPTP field and “3200”  as EVENTID.
    • Number of entries > 0 show the usage of BEx Analyzer / Workbooks in the system.
  • The USERID field in the results will identify which users are actively using BEx tools

If you export the USERID list from here and select the distinct entries, you will have all user ids who are still using BEx Aaalyzer.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: We need to download billing documents in mass at a time
entry.content:
we already tried this way and we are getting the out put in binary coded (kindly check the attachment) how can we convert that binary output into pdf .this is what we want to know exactly .

please kindly check and let us know how can we convert that binary code into pdf to produce the output to buiness.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mass-download-billing-document-pdf-output/qaq-p/13707076


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to identify the list of users using SAP bex analy...
entry.content:
Hi Vincent,

In order to identify the list of users still using BEx Analyzer, go totransaction SE16, and table RSDDSTAT_OLAP:

For BEx Analyzer / Workbook usage: Use selection “BEX” as STEPTP field and “3200” as EVENTID. Number of entries > 0 show the usage of BEx Analyzer / Workbooks in the system.

The USERID field in the results will identify which users are actively using BEx tools.

If you export the USERID list from here and select the distinct entries, you will have all user ids who are still using BEx Aaalyzer. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: While printing a Form LOGO is missing for the new com...
entry.content:
Dear Chuma,

I hope this message finds you well. Thank you for your prompt response and guidance regarding the Maintain Logos app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. I appreciate your time and effort in helping me resolve this issue.

I followed your suggestion to use the "Maintain Logos" app to upload the logo for the new company code. However, the logo is still not appearing on the form used in the Voucher Printing app, which is a custom-built application developed using CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model).

Could you kindly clarify if there are alternative methods to verify or manage the form template, apart from using the "Maintain Form Templates" app? I’m unable to locate the specific form used in the Voucher Printing app within the Maintain Form Templates app. Any insights or solutions to ensure the logo reflects correctly in the voucher printing form would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for your support.

Best regards,

Sanjay

entry.title: Use Multiple Events(Create, Update, Delete) in a single Workflow using Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hi, I am trying to create one workflow using Build Process Automation in BTP cockpit using Event as a Trigger. It's allowing me to add only one event in the start trigger. We have a requirement to trigger the workflow when a Material is created/updated/deleted. Is there any option to add all the three events as start trigger in a single workflow?

entry.title: Re: manifest.json always 404 in launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I was able to fix the issue by adjusting my xs-app.json. After adding the following section, the manifest.json became accessible.

 

    {
      "source": "^/index.html(.*)$",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }

entry.title: Re: manifest.json always 404 in launchpad

entry.title: i want to merge the dulplicate values in sap.m.table and align them to center as shown in image
entry.content:
The table has to be formatted as above image and below is the table which i have removed duplicates using  mergeDuplicates="true"

view.xml

<mvc:View
  controllerName="formscoring.controller.View1"
  xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
  xmlns="sap.m">
  
  <Page id="page" title="Supplier Quality Monthly Scoring">
    <content>
      <Table id="SupplierTable" items="{supplier>/SupplierScoring}" inset="false" >
        <columns>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Category" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Item" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Performance Metric" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Criteria / Weightage" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" mergeDuplicates="true" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Max Score" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Score" /></Column>
          <Column hAlign="Center" class="centerVertical"><Text text="Remarks / Justification" /></Column>
        </columns>
        <items>
          <ColumnListItem   >
            <cells >
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Category}"  />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Item}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>PerformanceMetric}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Criteria}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>MaxScore}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Score}" />
              <Text class="centerVertical" text="{supplier>Remarks}" />
            </cells>
          </ColumnListItem>
        </items>
      </Table>
    </content>
  </Page>
</mvc:View>
 
.centerVertical {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
}

entry.title: How to Handle Currency Decimal Places in Amount Conversion and Reporting in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a question regarding currency conversion for amounts.

I use KRW, which has zero decimal places. For example, when I enter 1,000 in the SAP system, it is stored internally as 10.00. Therefore, in the reporting layer, I multiply the amount fields by 100.

The problem is that if there are hundreds of amount fields, I have to repeat this calculation hundreds of times in the script.

,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_F" * 100 ELSE "VV201_F" END AS "VV201_F"
,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_T" * 100 ELSE "VV201_T" END AS "VV201_T"
,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_V" * 100 ELSE "VV201_V" END AS "VV201_V"


What are the available methods for handling currency decimal places in Datasphere or a CDS View, and what is the simplest way to manage this?


I would also appreciate it if you could share some typical use cases for how this is handled in practice.

entry.title: Re: Personas EWM RF S/4HANA Public Cloud - custom input f...
entry.content:
Dear @BMEIJS,
Try Creating a script to change the focus of the field using the record functionality or using the code, and then assign this script to the On-Load event of the screen.

If multiple screen needs to be navigated, record those navigations also in the script, so that script reaches correct screen and the field, and then assign the script to the initial screen(screen which the system is always loaded) on-load event in screen persona.

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Android App Crashing with Object Card in Tab, and Bottom Navigation (MDK 25.6)
entry.content:
Hello Everyone

We are encountering a critical issue with our SAP MDK Android application, built using MDK SDK version 25.6. The app is frequently crashing, specifically when using Object Card controls in the tab and bottom navigation. We've also observed crashes on some seemingly "normal" pages that uses Object Card controls.

The crashes are significantly impacting the app's usability and we are struggling to identify the root cause. We have tried the following without success:

  • Rebuilding the custom client.

  • Testing on different Android devices and OS versions.

Specific Scenarios where crashes occur:

  • Object Card Pages: When displaying pages containing Object Card collections, particularly upon initial load or when interacting with the cards (e.g., scrolling, pressing).

  • Tab Navigation: When switching between tabs in a tabbed page.

  • Bottom Navigation: When navigating using the bottom navigation bar.

  • General Pages: Sporadic crashes on other pages, although less frequent than those involving object cards or navigation.

Any guidance, suggestions, or potential solutions would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: BPA : Maintaining Approver Team Members and Selection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on implementation of a standard BPA Template Fixed Asset Write off Approval.

We have a query regarding the optimized way to maintain Approval ids.

As per the requirement, the number of “Approval Levels” and “Approver Group” in each Level will be decided based on the Net Amount and Disposal Category.

We have designed the Decision Table accordingly to select the Approver Group.

But, we want to ensure that maintenance of users in approver groups can be done without need to touch the BPA object repeatedly.

As we understand, Decision table cannot be maintained directly in non-development environments.

We are exploring following methods and would like to highlight the challenges we are facing in implementing them,

  1. Cloud Identity Service,
    • How it will work:
      1.  We can Create Groups and maintain the users in each group  
    •  
    •  Challenges:
      1. Is it possible to create multiple variants of groups based on attributes like Country or Company Code?
      2. If we can, how to filter it in run time based on the actual data being processed in an instance?
      3. Can we use Group for sending only information Email Notifications to outlook (It only accepts mail id and no Group input available)?
  2. Responsibility Management,
    • How it will work :
      1.       A team is created containing Team members and each member is assigned an approver group
      2.       Attributes are added to team, which will help to select the team to be used based on country / company code  
    • Challenges:
      1.       Need to make API call to get Responsibility Management data
      2.       It is primarily designed for workflows on S/4, is it ok to use it with BPA application?
  3. Process Flexibility Cockpit,
    1. Is it possible to use it with BPA?
    2. If yes, can it be used to maintain the Decision Table directly?

 

Sharing an example of possible Approver Levels and corresponding Approver Groups for Single Country for your refence,

 

Value

Approval levels and Groups

(A : Approval Task, N : Only Notification)

< €500k

No Approval required

≥ €500k

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N)

≥€500k ≥€2 M

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N), 3) APG3 (A)

≥€2 M 

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N), 3) APG3 (A), 4) APG4 (N)

 

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: Re: Apply header-level freight split to line items based on quantity.
entry.content:
Hi MK,

I am not sure if I understood you correctly or not. I checked your attached pictures, the condition value for ZFS1 on header is 42000 THB (2100 THB * 20 Qty) and on item is 21000 THB (2100 * 10 Qty). Looks like the freight on header is already split to items.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM ABAP - RF Device Cookie (or any mechanism to track individual devices)
entry.content: User ID is a standard as well, i thought it would not fit, and if it fits it is much easier (even you have two different ways for printer determination) Maybe it could be user printer which user can setup in User parameters, in this case it is transparent solution, especially if dialog user can use the same logic.

entry.title: Re: Overall Performance Rating for Compensation Module -...
entry.content:
Hi DavidSomelofske,

Thank you very much for your quick response and the overview. Can you please help me to find out whether the SAP standard requires the rating stored in the Talent Profile to be used in SF Compensation? Or does the SAP standard not make a precise statement on this and is it perfectly okay to use a rating other than the rating stored in the Talent Profile?

Many thanks in advance for your help. The question came up for us because we want to stay very close to the SAP standard, but according to my logic, the rating stored in the Talent Profile does not necessarily have to be used for the Compensation module in order to remain close to the SAP standard. But I could not find any information about it what the SAP standard says here, and one of my colelagues assumes that the entered rating in the talent profile needs to be used for the compensation modul as well and that no other rating should be used.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: WebI report fails to load data in the first run
entry.content: Is there a partial refresh? Do you see a small gold triangle in the bottom right hand corner after you refresh the report?

entry.title: Sales Tax not derived in professional services project based sales order
entry.content:
Scope - J11 is used in the current system setup. customer project is created and the sales order is generated by the system automatically. while creating the billing document, it is observed that system is not deriving the sales tax. 

sales order ID - 8; Customer ID - 90000, product- P001.

entry.title: Re: Custom Code decommission - Transaction usage
entry.content: ST03N will only count an object as used when it is actually executed. When Transactions are loaded into memory but not executed yet, they will not be counted by ST03N. Please check more detailed explanation in below KBA:3113122 - Custom Code PROG is missing Last Usage information "Resolution In the case of a report that means: 1) Starting the report (e.g. press F8 in SE80) causes - that the selection screen (dynpro) is generated - the selection screen (dynpro) is shown - the ABAP report is loaded into memory (triggering SBLM) - but no single line of ABAP code was called/executed to this point. (Unless you have defined a load-of-program event in the report) 2) Executing the report (e.g. press F8 when your selection screen is visible for inputs) triggers the execution of the start-of-selection part in the report, which is an actual call of ABAP code and therefore triggers SCMON log-writing. The assumption is that a user started the transaction/report but did not actually execute it. Therefore no ABAP code was actually called/executed and therefore it would be correct that SCMON did not write a record."

entry.title: SuccessFactors Onboarding - Attach 1 specific signed custom document in Onboardee Notification
entry.content: How can I attach 1 specific custom Signed document in Onboarding Notification when recipient is Onboardee.

entry.title: Re: how to display technical field name on Fiori

entry.title: Re: Industry fields in the Customer/Supplier master data not populated in supplier line items
entry.content: Added the tag

entry.title: How to change the Rating Calculation in Performance and 360° Forms (Need Mean Calculation)?
entry.content:
We would like to change the rating calculation method in Performance and 360° forms where behaviors are evaluated. Currently, the rating calculation does not use a classical average (mean), but instead follows the methodology described in  KBA 2642965.

The current calculation method, which excludes ratings of 0 or "no rating," does not align with the needs of certain organizations. Specifically, the exclusion of these ratings results in an incomplete and potentially skewed evaluation. A classical mean calculation, where ratings of 0 are included in the total count, would provide a more accurate and comprehensive performance assessment.

Is there any way to adjust the rating calculation method?

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals

entry.title: Re: QM MIC as part of reference operation sets
entry.content: Hi all, I encountered the same issue today and figured that the S routing (ref. operation set) with the MIC linked is normally used in rework order which there is no header material. So there's no inspection lot created letting alone IC. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Error in Goal Plan when sum of weights is greater tha...

entry.title: Re: Session 5 Recap & Highlights - Enterprise Architects guide on SAP BW Modernization
entry.content: I was a bit disappointed about the presentation. Basically nothing new to tell just repetition. It is not about "BW Modernization" it is about keeping it alive. BW will not become more modern by putting it in the cloud it is still 25+ years old tech. Admitted the ability to create data products will make a difference but it will only make us even more dependent on old tech.

entry.title: Ariba Central Invoice Management – Automatic Invoice Parking in Public Cloud (Scope Item 4N6)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

we are currently working with Ariba Central Invoice Management and would like to configure it in a way that incoming invoices are automatically parked (preposted) so that an SAP workflow can be triggered based on the parked invoice document in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

At the moment, whenever the background check is successful, the invoices are automatically posted, which bypasses the workflow process.

We are working within Scope Item 4N6, and the goal is to ensure the workflow runs directly in the Public Cloud environment.

Here is the related SAP Help documentation:
Central Invoice Management – Invoice Processing

Has anyone managed to configure this behavior successfully? Any advice or insights would be highly appreciated!

Best regards,
Aljoscha

entry.title: Re: Can you reuse a Cost Center Number if deleted ?

Regards

Jun Yan

entry.title: Re: how to throw message in webdynpro
entry.content:
Hi Colleague,

in method WDDOMODIFYVIEW, there is an importing reference VIEW (type ref to IF_WD_VIEW).

From here you can access the method IF_WD_CONTROLLER~GET_MESSAGE_MANAGER, which returns a reference of type IF_WD_MESSAGE_MANAGER.

Best regards,

Simon

entry.title: Re: badi
entry.content: Hello Chuma , Thankyou for prompt responses

entry.title: Setting of different Credit Limit Days as per different customer
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Can we set different Credit Limit days for different Customer, so that Business can decide what Maximum Pay Period to be provided to different customer as per their sales/payment record. If the Credit Limit day goes over, the Customer will be automatically Blocked for delivery.

Customer A: 90 days

Customer B: 100 days

Customer C: 110 days.

If this configuration is possible, could you please tell me the process.

entry.title: what is the odatav2 api to add a material assignment to production routing header
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i've been using the API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING api to post a new material assignment to SAP public cloud.

somehting like this:

query = `/ProductionRoutingHeader(ProductionRouting='${ProductionRout}', ProductionRoutingGroup='${ProductionRoutGroup}',ProductionRoutingInternalVers='${ProductionRoutiVers}')/to_MatlAssgmt`
and then post the product and plant in the payload.
 
but it seems this got deprecated. Is there a replacement for this? i cant seem to find the same type of endpoint.
Thank you.

HI Team,

Why implementation we are facing the issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Business Planning (SAP IBP) 2505 - Available Now!
entry.content: Thanks Stephan. Have one more question; general feature availability is 2511 which is November version… but, do we need to have Joule Premium for that or just for early adopters? Can you please confirm on this if possible?

entry.title: Re: Error when creating a PIR from the RFP Award in Produ...
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for reaching out.
The PIR can only be sent when the vendor has been synchronized from S/4 to SLP and from there to Sourcing, the vendor is active, and has a SAP Vendor ID. Even if the supplier can be invited to an event, a PIR cannot be generated until the synch is done. Hence please make sure supplier has been synchronized and try to send the PIR again.

entry.title: Re: reg:Transfer posting from one sales order to another sales order( V C)
entry.content: Bro It is Possible

entry.title: Re: Dual control sensitive fields for vendor master in sap
entry.content:
Dear Mohammed Nafees,

  • Confirmation of changes on sensitive fields in customer/vendor master data is required during automatic payment run and cheque printing. There is no need to confirm the customer/vendor changes during invoice posting/manual payment.
  • The system only checks unconfirmed changes if online payments with forms (for example outgoing checks) are created during manual process. This is not the case in "normal" manual posting and clearing transactions, so that unconfirmed changes are not checked.

Kindly refer this KBA : Dual Control Sensitive Fields for Vendor Master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Credit Limit Request Business partner does not exist
entry.content: Hello We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Best Regards, Jahnavi

entry.title: Re: How to block supplier of service employee
entry.content: Hello Yrjin, We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Best Regards, Jahnavi

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Merle,

there is no need to enter the Payment Reason into both Business Partner AND invoice. One source is enough.

It is difficult to find out the issue without looking at your settings, but make sure that there are no invalid conditions anywhere above the element where you are mapping the Purpose Code. You can use the Trace Tool to verify that:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/analyze-the-processing-of-outgoing-payment-files-from-map-format-data/ba-p/13548449

Also make sure that:

1. You are using the same Application Area on your Payment Format and in the Purpose Codes mapping table

2. You are mapping the correct field (FPAYHX-SND_CTRY_CODE / FPAYHX-REC_CTRY_CODE)

Kind regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: Re: Custom Data Archiving - As a Background Job (without using SARA) - JIT Archiving as Example
entry.content:
Thank you for the share. Did anyone know what is the difference between ABOJ and Badi ARC_ADD_TABLE for custom data archiving?

BR,
Fox

entry.title: Re: • SAP Note 2348017 e • SAP Note 2220005
entry.content: Well, this seems to be no SAP IQ related question. Both notes are of the application side and both are released to customer. So, please explain, why you are asking here?

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Texts field in Manage Product Master Data

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Web IDEの画面に表示されているJava Build Pack1廃止の警告の件について
entry.content:
@MakotoS さん
ご回答ありがとうございます。
10月1日に延期になった件についてご回答ありがとうございます。
念のため確認させてください。
再デプロイやrestageを実行するとCloud Foundryアプリケーションが実行できなくなるとのことですが、
こちらは再デプロイやrestageを行わなければCloud Foundry上のアプリケーションに対して影響はないととらえても問題ないでしょうか？
確認理由としては今後再デプロイ等は実施するつもりがない想定なのですが、すでにデプロイ済みのものは動く状態を保ちたいという理由があります。

以上よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere into SAC - Seamless Planing
entry.content: Hi @William_Yu1, thanks for your response. From your perspective, what would be the recommended approach: Would you suggest loading the data from SAP Datasphere into the SAC model (which is already synchronized with Datasphere), for example via OData? Or would it be better to load the data directly from the source system (e.g., S/4HANA) into the model in SAC?

entry.title: Re: Utilities and Tax Payments in Brazil
entry.content:
Dear Prabhjyot_Singh,

could you please check, whether the Format Supplement (FBZP -> Payment Methods in Country -> Format Supplement (next to the format)) has the value "TAXUT"?

Thanks and regards,

Ondrej

entry.title: Re: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere...
entry.content: Hi @William_Yu1, thanks for your response. From your perspective, what would be the recommended approach: Would you suggest loading the data from SAP Datasphere into the SAC model (which is already synchronized with Datasphere), for example via OData? Or would it be better to load the data directly from the source system (e.g., S/4HANA) into the model in SAC?

entry.title: Prevent amount & quantity changes after PO release, allow other edits
entry.content:
Hi Experts . I want to configure the Purchase Order (PO) so that after the final release, users are not allowed to change the quantity or amount fields. However, they should still be able to edit other fields and add new item lines. This kind of control is possible for PR using the Release Indicator field selection, but I couldn’t find a similar standard way for PO. Is there a solution for this, or is an enhancement required?  

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: Gross Price PB00 default in PIR
entry.content: May i know why you wanted to use PB00 and also is there any issue using PPR0

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden Error on API-Proxy (BTP Integration Sui...
entry.content:
thanks for trying to helping me out! good to know it should work this way. i wasn't sure if i had to use more complex iFlows just for a simple api-"passthrough".

the service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER didnt exist in my dev-system so i created an implementation in /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

Now the direct call via Postman works as expected:

The only thing that caught my eye was the warning:

Seems like there is a problem with the certificate. Or the first in the cert-chain. Maybe the test-pings are not verifying certs but in the actual api-call btp verifies it?

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@Ondrej_ZATOPEK 

Dear Ondrej, 

thank you for your answer. It works if I use the german CGI_CT format, but not when I use the Indian one. 

In the Indian format I have the following problem: When I assign the source for the purpose code to the structure field FPAYHX-SND_CTRY_CODE (Purpose Code of Sender Bank) and FPAYHX-REC_CTRY_CODE (Purpose Code of Receiver Bank), the value doesn’t show up in the payment media file. If I use a constant instead, the purpose code is included, which makes me think the issue lies with the structure field mapping.

Do you have an idea why that is the case?

Kind regards, 
Merle

entry.title: Re: Incremental load failed - error unknown
entry.content: Hi @DariusSoreata - The latest incremental load ran successfully, I am not sure if this is still an issue or not.

entry.title: Re: Sending order confirmation with attachments via email...
entry.content:
Either:

a) developer creates a version of the master form that includes them (perhaps on the back?)

b) Could they be included within the email template used when sending the order confirmation

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Web IDEの画面に表示されているJava Build Pack1廃止の警告の件について
entry.content:
例えば、使用しているライブラリのバージョンが古くなったり、なんらかのセキュリティ的な対応が必要だったり、開発したアプリにバグが発見されたりなど、コードの修正＆再デプロイが必要になる場面は多く存在すると思いますので、基本的にSAP Java Buildpack2への対応は必須だとご理解頂いた方がいいと思います。

その上で回答すると、10月1日以降のSAP Java Buildpack1が削除された環境でも、それ以前にすでにデプロイ済みのものがあり、再デプロイやrestageをしないのであれば、同じdropletが使われ続けるのでしばらくそのままアプリを動かし続けることは可能です（上記のとおり推奨はしないですが）。

entry.title: Re: SAP Transportation Management for T&L for SAP S/4HANA: Tax Determination for Individual Services
entry.content:
Hello Atul,
great work, thank you

entry.title: Re: Session 5 Recap & Highlights - Enterprise Architects guide on SAP BW Modernization
entry.content:
@appel_solar_dk  - Thank you for your candid feedback—it’s truly appreciated. You’re absolutely right that simply moving BW to the cloud doesn’t automatically equate to modernization, especially when the underlying core remains rooted in decades-old architecture.  That said, the intent with this session as twofold: first, to help organizations get clarity on transition paths (whether to BW/4HANA or DataSphere), and second, to introduce architectural thinking around decoupling, governance, and data productization. 

Hopefully, upcoming sessions in the series will push the envelope a bit further, particularly around innovation layers (like semantic integration or AI-driven orchestration), rather than just platform repositioning. Your feedback definitely helps steer the dialogue in that direction.

cc: @JaSoN_Luo

entry.title: Re: Apply header-level freight split to line items based on quantity.
entry.content:
Thank you for your reply @Nina_Kou .
We entered the value of ZFS1 (Freight – Header Level) as 2,100 THB, but the system is automatically calculating the condition value as 42,000 THB.

The requirement is when we input 2,100 THB at the header level, it should be automatically divided by the total quantity to get the freight per unit, and then multiplied by the quantity at each line item accordingly.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM public api CORS error
entry.content: Ive tried your approach and this was successful. my code is a little different but using nodejs is working. To bad we cannot do a direct call to the SAP api via a front end framework like React, Vue or Angular.

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden Error on API-Proxy (BTP Integration Sui...
entry.content: Im looking into the certificate-problem. checking strust and trying verify the certificate used in SSL-Server Standard
